# Adversarial Extraction Fixtures

These files support `scripts/run_adversarial_inputs.py`.

- `long_public_consultation.txt`: GOV.UK public consultation text, source URL embedded in the file header, >50k characters.
- `contradictory_policy.txt`: synthetic policy memo with internally contradictory clauses.
- `off_topic_junk.txt`: deliberately off-topic junk text.
- `near_empty.txt`: minimal input.
- `non_policy_technical.txt`: non-policy technical document.
